phase_a.evidence: All 2 owned files present (adapters/shared/schemas/observations.schema.yaml, .furrow/almanac/observations.yaml). Schema well-formed (Draft202012Validator.check_schema). additionalProperties:false at items and triggered_by levels. kind/lifecycle/triggered_by.type enums correct.

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: SCHEMA_WELL_FORMED via Draft202012Validator.check_schema. All 8 probes pass: empty, watch-min, dr-min, reject-row_merged, reject-rows_since-no-count, reject-watch-no-signal, reject-dr-no-question, reject-unknown-field.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: Every `if` clause carries `required: [<discriminator>]`: lines 66-67 (row_archived), 76-77 (rows_since), 87-88 (manual), 175-176 (watch), 225-226 (decision-review). additionalProperties:false at items (line 20) and triggered_by (line 38).

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: Top-level structure parallels todos.schema.yaml: leading comment + $schema draft 2020-12 + title/description/type:array/items. Same id pattern, 2-space indent, double-quoted strings, same enum format.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: Commit 677da44 touches only D1-owned files + rws-managed state.json/summary.md.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: Correctness probes cover all 8 spec-required validation scenarios at both positive and negative discriminator boundaries.
